capture.alt: The ReproForge issue intake showing the trusted sample, allowlisted no-network fixture, and an investigator label reading Offline sample and GPT-5.6 not configured.
capture.caption: The production UI distinguishes its offline trusted sample from the unconfigured live GPT-5.6 adapter.

sanitization: Synthetic bundled fixture only; no API key, credentials, private repositories, personal data, or user-provided content.
